steps.t: Aggy Digweed is at the entrance to the Trestlespan at the northern edge of Trestlebridge. You should speak with Aggy Digweed.
Orc encampments have been spotted north-east of Trestlebridge. You should investigate the Orc-camps for signs of the black-fire, and carefully destroy…
Aggy Digweed can be found in Trestlebridge. You should return to Aggy Digweed with the news that you destroyed all the remaining crates of incendiary …
Captain Trotter is in Trestlebridge. You should speak with Captain Trotter.
